executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 202 threat advisories. Of these, 35 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 13 as HIGH risk. 1 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
